MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Kendra Crawford.
Attorney Tony Ruch appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jasmine McFadden and William Steven are present.
Attorney Salvatore C. Timpano representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of JAN-30-2012 remains on calendar.
